header.session_definition: same actor, same guild, within a 10-minute interaction session (design-spec §2.10.4)
header.note: SEEDED-EMPTY at birth: the sim never runs on invented data. The Phase-0.5 telemetry sidecar capture on the live bot (owner-scheduled, build-brief §8.6) replaces this file with measured per-node counts + the pairwise co-occurrence matrix; until then every objective runs on a neutral prior with confidence=low and arrangement changes stay Exempt.
